name: Bonner Springs Community Center
description: Bonner Springs Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Bonner Springs, KS. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Klamm park
description: Klamm park is a place to play pickleball in Kansas City, KS. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Lake Quivira Country Club
description: Lake Quivira Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lake Quivira, KS. There are 6 concrete courts. 4 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, food, and locker rooms. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — Lake Quivira Country Club Members or Guests

name: Wyco Lake Courts
description: Wyco Lake Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Kansas City, KS. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
